race.description: Twin Lakes Air & Solar Provincial 2&3YO Mdn Hcp
race.comment: POPULISM (8) Yes Yes Yes filly from Shaik on debut for the Kim Waugh yard. Has impressed in her last two trials and the booking of Tommy Berry is a good lead from the inside gate. Go close on her home track. AXHRO (10) two-year-old Lonhro gelding out of Axella on debut for the Kearney stable. Has shown enough in his last two trials to suggest he can test some of his older rivals in a fairly average contest. DWIGHT (5) found the 1000m too short on debut with a plugging fifth over 1000m at Kembla Grange in a decent rating contest. Blinkers go on and can run into the minor money from the wide gate. FROGMORE (14) hardly excited in her two runs back and the stable will be looking for the blinkers to do the trick over the 1200m. Drifted back from the sticky gate and failed to make an impression when sixth over 1100m at this track. Minor place hope.
